caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing shop. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" with "SON" written smaller beneath it. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background contains various framed photographs on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing. A small logo consisting of a red circle and the text "BOOST TALK 101" is visible in the lower corners of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking while looking slightly to his left. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing to articulate words while he remains focused on someone off-camera.
